current_agenda: Keep The Rusted Loom Tavern workable through the obligations of assistant curator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around The Rusted Loom Tavern, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of assistant curator visibly slip.
